content: shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4 + Vite: run 'npx shadcn@latest init' (or 'npx shadcn@latest init -t vite'). The CLI can now initialize with Tailwind v4. HSL colors converted to OKLCH in v4 projects. CSS vars live outside @layer base and are mapped via '@theme inline { --color-background: var(--background); }'. shadcn uses --background/--foreground/--card/--border/--muted/--accent/--destructive CSS variable names; these must be overridden to match custom palette. Dark mode via .dark selector overriding same tokens. Components added via 'npx shadcn@latest add <name>'. tailwindcss-animate plugin usage changed — may need update. Border default-color changed to currentColor in v4 (potential regression if not using explicit color classes). Current shadcn CLI: shadcn@latest from official registry only.
